Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi Bus 915 Timings Ain Al Faydah to Towayyah Healthcare Center

June 27, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

The public transport system in Abu Dhabi is all efficient and well linked for its public and visitors. It adds that bus 915, which goes to Towayyah Healthcare Center from Ain Al Faydah, is a key route. The 915 route is a great route to commute daily and even for tourists. We will explore operational details, key stops and travel tips that will make your experience pleasant in this guide.

Contents

Operational Details

Bus 915 runs throughout the day with regular depatures from Ain Al Faydah and Towayyah Healthcare Center. Below is the detailed timetable for Bus 915 from both ends of the route:

915 Weekday Morning Schedule

915 Weekday Evening Schedule

915 Weekend Morning Schedule

915 Weekend Evening ScheduleThe full schedule of the Bus 915 is available on the official AD Mobility website or you can easily click on this link for 915 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Single zone travel on Bus 915 starts from AED 2 as the standard fare. Passengers are advised to use the Hafilat Card and can easily recharge their cards at kiosks or online.

Route Overview

Route 915 Bus is a great link to important places in Al Ain and is highly important for residents and tourists. Here are some of the main stops along the way:

  1. Ain Al Faydah: The starting point, offering easy access to nearby hotels and local services.

  2. Ain Al Faydah Hotel: Close to accommodation options for visitors.

  3. 88 Street: A bustling street lined with shops and services.

  4. Neima Healthcare Center: A prominent healthcare facility in the area.

  5. Neima Playground: A recreational spot for families and children.

  6. Souq: A local market offering a variety of goods.

  7. Al Salheen Mosque: A religious and cultural landmark.

  8. Zakhir East Police Station: A key stop for public safety and services.

  9. Neima 1 Playground: A popular place for outdoor activities.

  10. Zayed House for Islamic Culture: A center for learning about Islamic heritage.

  11. AFCOOP: A commercial area offering various services.

  12. Sultan Ali Saif Mohayri Mosque: A beautiful mosque in the heart of the city.

  13. HCT Men’s College: A prominent educational institution.

  14. Omar Ibn Abdulaziz Mosque: An important cultural and religious site.

  15. Al Ain Zoo: A well-known family destination with diverse wildlife.

  16. HCT Women’s College: An educational institution for female students.

  17. Al Taqwa Mosque: A key religious site for the community.

  18. ADNOC: The main stop near ADNOC facilities.

  19. Etisalat: A telecommunications hub in Al Ain.

  20. Al Ain Palace Museum: A glimpse into the city’s royal history and culture.

  21. Post Office: The main postal service center.

  22. Department of Public Health: A key location for health-related services.

  23. Shiekha Salama Mosque: A beautiful mosque with historical significance.

  24. Al Noor Hospital South: A major healthcare provider.

  25. City Centre: A popular shopping and dining destination.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Mediclinic: A private healthcare center.

  2. Union National Bank: A financial services location.

  3. President Palace West: An important government building.

29.

30.

  1. NMC Hospital: A well-known healthcare institution.

  2. Al Ain Hospital: A major hospital serving the community.

  3. Al Ain Dental Clinic: A specialized healthcare facility.

  4. Al Ain Courts Complex: The main judicial center.

  5. Al Ain Municipality West: A government building for local administration.

  6. Al Ain Municipality: The central office for city planning and management.

  7. Department of Immigration and Passports: For all immigration-related services.

  8. Al Jimi Mall: A shopping mall offering retail stores and entertainment.

  9. Zayed The First Street: A key street with various shops and landmarks.

40.

  1. Sheikh Muhammad Bin Khalifa Al Nahyan Mosque: A mosque with cultural significance.

  2. Khawarizmi International College: An educational institution offering various programs.

  3. Towayyah Park: A recreational area with green spaces.

  4. Al Tawteen Council: A government facility focused on national development.

  5. Emirates National Schools Staff Accommodation: Housing for school staff.

  6. Towayyah Healthcare Center: The final stop, offering essential healthcare services.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Some nearby attractions include:

  1. Al Ain Zoo: A renowned zoo showcasing various species and offering educational activities for families.

  2. Al Ain Palace Museum: A place to explore the history of Al Ain’s royal family and heritage.

3.

  1. Al Ain City Centre and Mall: Offering shopping, dining, and entertainment options for all ages.

  2. Al Tawyeen Park: A peaceful space for relaxation and outdoor activities.

  3. Jebel Hafeet: A majestic mountain offering breathtaking views of Al Ain and surrounding areas, with a scenic drive and picnic spots.

  4. Al Jahili Fort: A historic fort that showcases the region’s history and culture, with exhibitions about the city’s heritage.

  5. Wadi Adventure: A unique adventure park that offers water sports, ziplining, and more, located at the base of Jebel Hafeet.

9.

10.

Journey Experience

The start is at Ain Al Faydah, then past the Ain Al Faydah Hotel and peaceful 88 Street, where you can visit the Al Ain Zoo, famous for its wildlife, and the magnificent Sheikh Khalifa Bin Zayed Grand Mosque.

The bus also travels past the Al Ain Palace Museum, where you can learn about the city’s royal history, and the busy Al Ain City Centre for shopping and eating. Al Tawyeen Park is a place to relax and remains peaceful. For those wanting to take in the best of Al Ain’s culture, history, and modern amenities in one smooth ride, this is the perfect long but enjoyable trip.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: June 27, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
